description_long: This is a modern, high-caliber sniper rifle featuring a long, heavy barrel and a robust, angular receiver. It is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on top for precision aiming at long distances. The rifle has a detachable box magazine located in front of the trigger guard, and a fixed stock with a pronounced cheek rest for stability. A bipod is attached near the front of the barrel, providing support for prone or bench shooting. The muzzle is fitted with a prominent muzzle brake to reduce recoil. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a tactical and professional appearance.
description: A matte black sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, bipod, and detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, bipod, magazine, and fixed stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, bipod legs, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, magazine, and stock, mirroring the main features of view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
